Home Overview

Uganda Christian Institute School of Nursing and Midwifery, Lira

Faith-rooted nursing and midwifery education for compassionate healthcare leaders.

This official-facing demo experience is focused on clear programme visibility, admissions momentum, and strong institutional trust through real campus and student imagery.

Start Admissions Browse Programmes

6+

Core public-facing sections refined for fast discovery

100%

Responsive layout across mobile, tablet and desktop

24/7

Admissions access through clear call-to-action paths

Faith

Values-first positioning carried throughout the experience

Programmes

Core study pathways built for real-world healthcare service

Start from certificate level, progress through direct diploma routes, or advance through extension tracks designed for practicing professionals.

Certificate

Certificate in Enrolled Nursing

Typically 2.5 years

A foundation programme designed to build safe, compassionate, practice-ready nursing professionals.

Practical training emphasisClinical professionalismValues-based care
Certificate

Certificate in Midwifery

Typically 2.5 years

Focused preparation for maternal and newborn care through hands-on learning and supervised practice.

Maternal health focusSimulation-led learningCommunity impact
Diploma

Diploma in Nursing Direct

Typically 3 years

Advanced nursing education pathway for students aiming for broader clinical competence and leadership growth.

Expanded clinical depthProfessional growthDirect-entry route
Why UCI Lira

A values-first institution with practical learning focus

Each section of this website is designed to make discovery easier for applicants, parents, and partners while preserving the school's identity.

Modern, welcoming digital experience

The site is designed to feel elevated, clear, and professional while staying easy to use for applicants and guardians on any device.

Admissions-first information flow

Visitors can move quickly from discovery to action through clear programme cards, application guidance, and admissions calls-to-action.

Strong visual storytelling

Campus scenes, training moments, and graduation imagery create trust and help the school feel real, active, and aspirational.

Built for Netlify and easy iteration

A static Astro codebase keeps the site lightweight, dependable, and simple to revise during client testing and review.

Gallery Preview

A quick visual look at campus spaces, practical sessions, and milestone celebrations.

News

Recent updates in admissions and programme discovery

Stay aligned with current changes, improvements, and update highlights relevant to future applicants.

March 2026

Admissions support made clearer for prospective applicants

The redesigned admissions experience puts online application access, form downloads, and campus enquiry paths in one visible flow.

Explore →

March 2026

Gallery-led storytelling now highlights campus and skills training

A refreshed gallery direction helps visitors see campus life, student engagement, and the practical side of health training at a glance.

Explore →

March 2026

Programme discovery improved for nursing and midwifery prospects

Visitors can browse certificates, direct diplomas, and extension pathways in a cleaner, more confidence-building layout.

Explore →
